title: Smoky Velvety Polish Beets Salad
description: A kid-friendly Polish beet salad that balances smoky, earthy beets with a velvety olive oil dressing, delivering a subtle bitterness and comforting texture.
instructions: Wash the beets, trim stems and leaves, wrap each in foil and roast on a baking sheet for 45–60 minutes until tender.
Remove beets from the oven, let them cool slightly, then peel and cut into bite‑sized cubes.
In a medium bowl, whisk together olive oil, apple cider vinegar, Dijon mustard, honey, salt, and pepper until the dressing emulsifies.
Stir in the chopped dill and a pinch of lemon zest (optional).
Toss the beet cubes with the dressing, then add baby spinach and gently fold to combine.
Season with additional salt and pepper if desired.
Refrigerate the salad for at least 15 minutes to allow flavors to meld.
Serve chilled, garnished with a sprinkle of sea salt flakes if using.
